title: Groundwork Frontmatter
description: Validates the groundwork: block in skill frontmatter. Defines pipeline participation: stage, required artifacts, and produced artifacts.

groundwork.description: Pipeline contract metadata for a Groundwork skill.

stage.description: The pipeline stage this skill belongs to.

requires.description: Artifacts this skill requires as input.

produces.description: Artifacts this skill produces as output.

artifact-entry.description: A pipeline artifact reference: a type name and its schema location.

artifact.description: The artifact type name (a stable identifier, not a file path).

schema.description: Path to the artifact's schema, relative to .groundwork/.
